reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_41. flags is assigned in the loop at L21 and updated at L37-38 or L41-42 in c76df14dfb4.c but never read outside the loop body — genuine dead store across all real feature flag combinations. New bug. PC contains restrictive library macros making it over-constrained.
